title: Senior Frontend System Design Handbook
subtitle: Beyond the Component
author: Ranveer Kumar
authorTitle: UI Technology Director, Frontend Architecture Practitioner
authorBio: Ranveer Kumar is a UI Technology Director and Frontend Architecture Practitioner with 22+ years of experience designing scalable UI systems, leading large engineering organizations, building frontend platforms and design systems, and applying AI-assisted engineering practices. He has led and mentored 100+ engineers annually across 14+ industries. Beyond software, he builds smart living systems, solar power infrastructure, home automation, homelab environments, hardware/electronics, woodworking, metal work, and smart/organic farming systems.
description: A practical field guide for senior frontend engineers, UI architects, and engineering leaders designing scalable, performant, resilient, secure, and maintainable frontend systems.

chapters.title: Chapter 8: Failure Handling in Frontend Systems
Chapter 10: Senior Frontend System Design Interviews
